description_long: This is a low-profile, rectangular wooden cabinet with a dark brown finish, designed for modern urban interiors or public spaces. The front features two wide doors on either side, each equipped with a sleek metallic handle, and a central open shelving section with two horizontal shelves, likely for media or electronics. The cabinet's sides and top are flat and unadorned, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The handles are horizontally oriented, suggesting the doors swing open sideways, while the open shelves provide easy access to stored items. The construction appears solid, with a likely hollow interior for storage and cable management. The overall design is functional and contemporary, suitable for use as a TV stand, media console, or general storage unit in urban environments.
description: A dark brown, rectangular wooden cabinet with two side doors featuring metallic handles and a central open shelving section, designed in a minimalist modern style.
description_view_0: Front view showing two side doors with metallic handles and a central open shelving section.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, unadorned rectangular profile of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view, similar to the front but with less visible detail on handles and shelves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with a plain, flat surface.
